mapper.sql: rorderno, orderno, itemno, stateCode, CustomerNo, UserNo, deptNo, ordType, ModelNo, Quantity, specMark, hopeDeliveryDate, requestTime, requestWarehouseId, purchaseType, OrdDate, supplierId, purchaseWarehouseId, TransType, inventoryPropertyId, cre_time, corderNO, remark, warehouse_code, inventory_status, qty, qa_status, prepare_quantity, version, Code, ExArrivalDate, delflag, creator, invoiceno
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._orderdata_gz
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._orderdata_gz (rorderno, orderno, itemno, stateCode, CustomerNo, UserNo, deptNo, ordType, ModelNo, Quantity, specMark, hopeDeliveryDate, requestTime, requestWarehouseId, purchaseType, OrdDate, supplierId, purchaseWarehouseId, TransType, inventoryPropertyId, cre_time, corderNO, remark, warehouse_code, inventory_status, qty, qa_status, prepare_quantity, version, Code, ExArrivalDate, delflag, creator, invoiceno) values (#{rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{specmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{requesttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{requestwarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchasetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchasewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qaStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{prepareQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exarrivaldate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo._orderdata_gz
rorderno,
orderno,
itemno,
stateCode,
CustomerNo,
UserNo,
deptNo,
ordType,

specMark,

warehouse_code,
inventory_status,

qa_status,
prepare_quantity,
version,

delflag,
creator,

mapper.update:
update dbo._orderdata_gz
rorderno = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderno = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemno = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ordType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
specMark = #{record.specmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hopeDeliveryDate = #{record.hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
requestTime = #{record.requesttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
requestWarehouseId = #{record.requestwarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdDate = #{record.orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchaseWarehouseId = #{record.purchasewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
inventoryPropertyId = #{record.inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
corderNO = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_status = #{record.inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qa_status = #{record.qaStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
prepare_quantity = #{record.prepareQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Code = #{record.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ExArrivalDate = #{record.exarrivaldate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoiceno = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._orderdata_gz set rorderno = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderno = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, itemno = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ordType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, specMark = #{record.specmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hopeDeliveryDate = #{record.hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, requestTime = #{record.requesttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, requestWarehouseId = #{record.requestwarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OrdDate = #{record.orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchaseWarehouseId = #{record.purchasewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, inventoryPropertyId = #{record.inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, corderNO = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_status = #{record.inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qa_status = #{record.qaStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, prepare_quantity = #{record.prepareQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Code = #{record.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ExArrivalDate = #{record.exarrivaldate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoiceno = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
